enum_values.name: Shader
enum_values.summary: Display shader, very basic colour information, nothing more.

enum_values.name: RhinoMaterial
enum_values.summary: A material from the Rhino document, identified by ID.

enum_values.name: XmlMaterial
enum_values.summary: A material defined by an RDK Xml string.

enum_values.name: RmtlMaterial
enum_values.summary: A material loaded from an RMTL file.
